analysis: The project is a static website about black holes with an existing dark theme. The current files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for interactive slides and animations. The theme needs to be enhanced with more cosmic and black hole-specific visual elements, including animated objects and slides. The CSS file should be completed with full cosmic animations, and the JavaScript should be fixed and enhanced for better interactivity.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with full cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, glowing elements, and animated slides to enhance the black hole topic.
Fix syntax errors in the showSlide function and implement full JavaScript functionality for interactive slides, animations, and mobile menu toggle to ensure smooth user experience.
Complete the HTML content to include all sections related to black holes, such as interactive planets, animated slides, and a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon.
